extension.name: Audio Mixer
extension.description: Control volume levels for individual tabs and audio sources.

status.presetsEmpty: Couldn't get presets, reset to default.
status.noAudioContent:
No audio detected on current tab.
You must play audio before opening the extension.
status.recordFailed: Error: unable to create and record from tab, check devtools.

content.noMedia: Error: no media found, despite the content tab playing audio.

capture.error: Error: record tab isn't playing audio but content tab is.

query.multiple: Error: expected one element but got many, check query
query.none: Error: expected one element but got none, check query

tabs.create: Error: unable to create record tab.

messages.exiting: Exiting, closed tabs, cleared storage and reset playback rate.

github.issue: Please open an issue on GitHub with any details you have.
github.website: If this website is already supported please open an issue on GitHub, if it isn't supported yet feel free to message me or open an issue on GitHub.
